Package microui.core.interfaces

Interface Visible

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractButton, AbstractShadow, BufferedView, Button, CheckBox, Component, Container, ContainerManager, ContentView, GraphicsBuffer, Hover, ImageBuffer, Knob, LabeledCheckBox, LinearRangeControl, MenuButton, PlainShadow, RangeControl, ReactiveShadow, Ripples, Scroll, Slider, SpatialView, TextArea, TextField, TextTooltipContent, TextView, Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipManager, View
public interface Visible
Interface for components that have visibility states.

Implementing this interface allows components to be shown or hidden dynamically. This is a fundamental interface for all visual elements in the MicroUI framework that need visibility control.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    isVisible()
    Checks whether the component is currently visible.
    void
    setVisible(boolean visible)
    Sets the visibility state of the component.

  • Method Details

    • isVisible

      boolean isVisible()
      Checks whether the component is currently visible.
      Returns:
      true if the component is visible, false if hidden

    • setVisible

      void setVisible(boolean visible)
      Sets the visibility state of the component.
      Parameters:
      visible - true to make the component visible, false to hide it
